mapper.select:
SELECT id, code, name, contact_person as contactPerson, phone, email, address, price_level as priceLevel, credit_limit as creditLimit, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM `customer`
AND code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contactPerson}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, code, name, contact_person as contactPerson, phone, email, address, price_level as priceLevel, credit_limit as creditLimit, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM `customer` WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `customer` (code, name, contact_person, phone, email, address, price_level, credit_limit, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{contactPerson}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{priceLevel}, #{creditLimit}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
